data.current_summary: Generate an image from a template
data.current_description: Generates an image using the specified template and modifications. Returns the image in the requested format (base64, binary, or url).
data.description_suggestion: Generates a customized image by applying modifications to the specified template. Accepts template ID and modification parameters via the request body. Supports three response formats: base64-encoded image data, binary image file, or URL reference. Returns the generated image in the requested format. This operation creates a new image asset based on the template configuration.
